R0242.title: Training Data Copyright and Authorization Risk
R0242.definition: AI training data has unclear provenance, authorization, or copyright status, creating compliance and commercial disputes.
keywords: Training Data Copyright and Authorization Risk
R0242.description: AI training data has unclear provenance, authorization, or copyright status, creating compliance and commercial disputes.
R0242.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
